title: Wild Rift Patch Notes 5.0c
paragraphs: Time flies! Look at that, we are on the last patch of 5.0! We got not one, not two but three events for you this patch! As well as a new champion, some new skins, and of course, our regularly scheduled balance changes. Welcome to patch 5.0c.
Reminder: content will be released throughout the patch.

Separate, but never parted, Kindred represents the twin essences of death. Lamb's bow offers a swift release from the mortal realm for those who accept their fate. Wolf hunts down those who run from their end, delivering violent finality within his crushing jaws. Though interpretations of Kindred's nature vary across Runeterra, every mortal must choose the true face of their death.
Kindred will be released on March 29 at 00:01 UTC
Wards on the streets are saying there’s a new Warden in town! Play through missions and earn rewards!
The Nautilus Pass event begins March 21 at 00:01 UTC
Spoiler alert, Kindred is coming out this patch! (It’s still a spoiler if you skipped the previous section.) Show off your knowledge and earn rewards!
The Kindred’s Trivia event begins March 29 at 00:01 UTC

Kindred is tumbling through the Rift, and trailing behind them is a new champion! Careful now, don’t get too close or you might get poked. You can earn guesses through completing missions, and if you guess correctly, there’s a big prize waiting!
The Name That Champion event begins March 29 at 00:01 UTC
TO THE SKIES! / SHOCK BLAST
Wukong rework will be live on March 21 at 00:01 UTC
We’re buffing the cost efficiency of Berserker’s Greaves to make it a great option for champions that rely on attacks.
Divine Sunderer hasn’t been offering players the best value for their gold compared to other items. We are adjusting its price and stats to make it consistent with other items.
We’re buffing Gargoyle’s active so tanks can effectively use the shield in fights. We’re also changing the damage reduction to disappear when the shield is broken.
Spear of Shojin hasn’t been having a great performance in the early game. We’re buffing its power in lane, while making sure it’s not overpowered for teamfights.
Stormrazor has been getting outshined by its fellow marksman items. We’re buffing its passive to make it a more valuable pick up again.
Trinity Force’s passive’s name has been changed so it no longer shares the same name as the one Black Cleaver has.
The channeling time has been optimized for when it’s been less than 1s.

Item crafting has been too expensive to use, so it’s been sitting unpicked, gathering dust. To make it a more appealing pick-up, we are adjusting the amount of gold needed to purchase an item outside.
Releasing March 21 @ 00:01 UTC
Warring Kingdoms Jarvan IV Mythic Chroma
Releasing March 21 @ 00:01 UTC
Woof and Lamb Kindred
Releasing March 29 @ 00:01 UTC
Pajama Guardian Cosplay Urgot
Releasing March 29 @ 00:01 UTC
